pack.summary: This resource provides foundational study notes, labeled 'test note 1,' designed for offline review and learning.
pack.deepExplanation: The resource contains a single, foundational set of notes. These notes serve as a starting point for learning the material and are intended to be reviewed offline. Since the content is brief, the focus is on recognizing its role as a core study reference.
